digest.greeting: Tuesday, June 9, Jean. Outlook shows 9 working-day meetings plus Santiago's all-day OOO, with the main anchors clustered around Jhara's portfolio/roadblock 1:1, Jorge's PM capacity review, Send Letters Queue 2.0 kickoff, PMs Workshop, and the Project Coordinator debrief. There are 12 carried-over items after de-duplication, no active reminders, and 3 urgent carry-over risks: KPI final approval, Incident Response priority/intake-owner clarity, and the Supabase security warning. The top priorities are to use today's meetings to close the PM capacity, hiring, Send Letters, CoE, and Phase 2 ownership loops; Teams broad activity could not be read because Microsoft Graph returned a 403, so Teams context is limited to Outlook-visible meeting and notification signals plus prior dashboard state.

items.label: Confirm KPI final approval
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday's daily digest and still unchecked in GitHub state. Action type: review/confirm. Mid-Year Touchpoints launched in Rippling; confirm all KPIs are approved/finalized after the KPI Review with Sara and close this only after approval is confirmed.

items.label: Clarify Incident Response priority path
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday and aging from last week. Action type: follow up/decide. Prior context showed no response yet from Cristian Garcia or Chelsea on Jill's prioritization direction, and Monday's Outlook-visible Teams notification added Lucia Caamano's note that the Incident Response template may point to the intake manager being informed. Confirm leadership clarity and the next alignment path.

items.label: Check Supabase security warning
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday and still urgent. Action type: review/decide. Review the critical table-publicly-accessible/RLS-disabled warning and decide whether the project is still active and needs remediation.

items.label: Close CoE guide follow-ups
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday and older than one digest cycle. Action type: follow up. Follow up with the remaining Team Leads on their CoE Brief Guide review with PMs/PEs; Janet's team was already confirmed, so verify the remaining TL confirmations.

items.label: Complete Nadia's affected-areas request
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday and originally from last week. Action type: complete/review. Complete Nadia Wilson's request on affected project areas for the EPMO, using the Salesforce Program Overview as supporting context.

items.label: Align CoE priorities with Jorge
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday. Action type: decide/follow up. Jorge Grijalva's Portfolio Review Summary says statuses, priorities, ownership, and notes were updated in the tracker; today's PM capacity review is a timely place to confirm CoE priorities and upcoming work alignment.

items.label: Review Rippling and Asana overdue tasks
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday and refreshed by unread Friday emails. Action type: review/complete. Rippling still shows overdue harassment prevention training from December 9, 2025; Asana shows one overdue task to consider updating project progress. Review the queue and close what is stale or complete.

items.label: Decide on expired Staff Aug recording
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday. Action type: decide. SharePoint previously indicated the Weekly Touchpoint Staff Augmentation Project recording expired and was deleted; restore it from recycle bin only if it is still needed for Staff Augmentation context.

items.label: Submit Project Coordinator feedback
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday and tied to today's 4:30 PM Project Coordinators Debriefing. Action type: review/decide. Rippling requested Jean's feedback on Isaac Gomez Ventura, and today's debrief is intended to discuss interviews and make a final decision.

items.label: Review Staff Aug PRD and queue impacts
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday. Action type: review/decide. Andrea Rodriguez's Staff Aug PRD input still needs a response or integration path, and today's Send Letters Queue 2.0 kickoff gives related queue/process context with Jhara, Andrea, and Ernestina.

items.label: Monitor DACA/I-90 remaining IT work
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday. Action type: monitor/follow up. Mar Garcia's recap says DACA RNWL and I-90 RNWL are on hold per Jill's direction, but request #0027951 and remaining IT/UAT items still need monitoring until confirmed complete or formally paused.

items.label: Resolve Phase 2 ownership and tool-support follow-ups
items.detail: Carry-over from Monday. Action type: decide/follow up. Close the loop on Phase 2 dashboard ownership, Jhara's OneDrive/SharePoint and Venn question, and whether EPMO has any remaining action after the Portfolio Review clarification thread. Jhara's unread decline for Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync is a fresh signal to confirm coverage or relevance.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The day is compressed from 10:00 AM through 5:00 PM, with the best protected focus window at 12:00 PM.

items.label: Santiago OOO continues
items.detail: Outlook shows Santiago Arango OOO through Tuesday, June 9, which may affect Incident Response, CoE, or PM/PE follow-ups that need his input.

items.label: 1:1 Jessica and Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1 with Jessica Richburg. Use only for live operational blockers or carry-over items that need Jessica's input.

items.label: 1:1 Jhara & Jean
items.detail: Agenda explicitly includes portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Good slot for Phase 2 ownership, OneDrive/SharePoint/Venn follow-up, and Send Letters readiness.

items.label: PMs capacity review
items.detail: Jorge scheduled this to review whether PM capacity is available for new department-level projects. This is a decision point for assignment capacity and CoE/portfolio prioritization.

items.label: Interview - Javier Hurtado - Project Coordinator
items.detail: Outlook still shows the Project Coordinator interview materials on the calendar. Treat as candidate context for the 4:30 PM debrief even if prior dashboard context said this slot may have been canceled.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected one-hour focus window before the afternoon meeting stack. Best use: prep PM capacity notes, Send Letters questions, and Project Coordinator feedback.

items.label: Send Letters Queue 2.0 - Project Kickoff
items.detail: Jhara's kickoff. Outlook context says Conflict of Interest and Case Withdrawal feed into the Send Letters Queue; EPMO is Jhara Ochoa and Andrea Rodriguez, and the IT BA is Ernestina Aguirrezabala.

items.label: bi-weekly sync (J & J)
items.detail: Janet scheduled this recurring sync for workload check-in, challenges, wins/accomplishments, and goals. Useful for CoE guide and escalation-process continuity.

items.label: 1:1 Yuri & Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1 with Yuri. Use for PM/PE coordination and any IT/UAT or Staff Aug follow-ups that need Yuri's input.

items.label: PMs Workshop
items.detail: Workshop rescheduled because Jean was OOO Monday. Purpose is PM capability improvement, areas for improvement, and wins.

items.label: Project Coordinators Debriefing
items.detail: Eugenia's invite says the team will discuss Project Coordinator interviews and make a final decision. This is the clearest hiring decision point of the day.

items.label: Prepare PM capacity answer for Jorge
items.detail: Action type: decide/prepare. Jorge's 11:00 AM PMs capacity review asks whether PMs have capacity for new department-level projects. Bring current PM availability, CoE priorities, and any constraints from the unresolved portfolio items.

items.label: Close Project Coordinator decision loop
items.detail: Action type: review/decide. Use the 12:00 PM focus block to finalize feedback from the Project Coordinator interviews before the 4:30 PM debrief, especially the carried-over Isaac Gomez Ventura feedback request.

items.label: Use Jhara 1:1 to clear roadblocks
items.detail: Action type: follow up/decide. Jhara's 10:30 AM agenda includes portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps; cover Phase 2 ownership, OneDrive/SharePoint/Venn status, and Send Letters kickoff readiness while the context is fresh.

items.label: Confirm Send Letters kickoff scope
items.detail: Action type: prepare/review. Today's kickoff ties Conflict of Interest and Case Withdrawal into the Send Letters Queue. Confirm the EPMO role, IT BA handoff expectations, and what needs to be standardized before the LC team spends less time assembling termination and withdrawal letters.

items.label: Decide whether Phase 2 sync still needs Jean
items.detail: Action type: decide/follow up. Jhara declined Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync this morning, and Andrea previously declined it Friday. Combined with the Phase 2 dashboard ownership thread, confirm whether Jean/EPMO still needs to attend or monitor that sync.

items.label: Jhara declined Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync
items.detail: Unread from Jhara at 6:31 AM AST. Action type: decide/follow up. This is likely calendar-noise unless Phase 2 ownership remains unclear; confirm whether the sync still needs Jean or EPMO coverage.

items.label: Send Letters Queue Sync invite
items.detail: Unread Monday invite from Jhara to Jean and Andrea. Action type: prepare. This appears related to today's Send Letters Queue 2.0 kickoff; review the invite only for timing/scope alignment before the kickoff.

items.label: Rippling and Asana overdue-task notices
items.detail: Unread Friday notices show one overdue Rippling task and one Asana overdue project-progress task. Action type: review/complete. These are operational queue items, not reply-required email threads, but they should be checked during a focus window.

items.label: Santiago Arango - OOO all day
items.detail: Outlook shows Santiago OOO through Tuesday, June 9. Build extra slack into Incident Response, CoE, and PM/PE follow-ups that would normally need him.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint plus DP Guidance
items.detail: Outlook shows both TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint and DP Guidance starting at 9:30 AM, creating a conflict zone. Decide which needs live attendance or coverage.

items.label: 1:1 David & Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1 with David. Useful for CoE, PM capability, and dashboard/tool-support follow-ups.

items.label: 1:1 Carolina and Jean
items.detail: Bi-weekly project/support check-in with Carolina.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected focus window before the afternoon EPMO stack.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting
items.detail: Operational updates, lessons learned, celebrations, and team topics. Good place to surface recurring blocker themes if they remain open.

items.label: Cybersecurity Awareness and CoE Biweekly Touchpoint overlap
items.detail: Outlook shows May Cybersecurity Awareness - Phishing Campaign at 3:00 PM and CoE Biweekly Touchpoint at 4:00 PM overlapping with focus time. Confirm which items need live attention.
